extension.description: Orion v3.4.5 - Complete media addon with Netflix-style interface for Movies, TV Shows, Kids Zone, and Trakt. All sections feature dedicated grid view with 30 items per page, Next/Prev navigation, and detail popup with Play/Trailer/Favorite buttons. Multiple torrent scrapers, Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration, watch history, favorites, auto-play next episode.
extension.news: [3.4.5] NEW: Kids Zone now has same Netflix-style layout as Movies and TV Shows. All three sections (Movies, TV Shows, Kids) feature grid view with 30 items per page, page navigation, and detail popups with Play/Trailer/Favorite buttons.
